query:
SELECT
            nr.status,
            EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - nr.last_heartbeat_at))::bigint as "age_secs: i64"
        FROM core.runs nr
        JOIN core.manifests nm ON nm.id = nr.manifest_id
        WHERE nm.name = 'sinexd'
          AND nr.status = 'running'
        ORDER BY nr.last_heartbeat_at DESC NULLS LAST
        LIMIT 1
